heading: Agreements to provide support to vaccination programs of Department of Health and Human Services

children.heading: Agreements authorized
children.label: a Agreements authorized
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may enter into agreements with the Secretary of Health and Human Services to provide support for vaccination programs of the Secretary of Health and Human Services in the United States through use of the excess peacetime biological weapons defense capability of the Department of Defense.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: Not later than , the Secretary of Defense shall submit to the congressional defense committees a report on the feasibility of providing Department of Defense support for vaccination programs under subsection (a) and shall identify resource requirements that are not within the Department’s capability.February 1, 1994
